summary: AgriDocs Phase 3 testing complete. All backend tests PASSED (10/10). All frontend tests PASSED. Compliance Dashboard working correctly with expired alerts (red), expiring soon alerts (amber), and Monthly Filing Tracker showing 6 tracked filings with correct dot indicators and progress counts.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend documents.py: GET /api/documents/compliance/summary correctly returns monthly_coverage, expiring_soon, expired arrays
Backend: sub_category_label properly included in both expiring_soon and expired arrays (fixed from previous missing projection)
Backend: expired query correctly filters by valid_until < today for validity/annual period types
Backend: expiring_soon correctly calculates days_left for documents expiring within 60 days
Frontend DocumentsPage.js: ComplianceDashboard component renders on root view only
Frontend: Dashboard correctly hides when searching or inside a category
Frontend: branch_id='all' fix working - parameter excluded from API calls when on All Branches view
Frontend: All 6 tracked monthly filings display with correct dot indicators (green=filed, red=missing, gray=upcoming)
Frontend: Progress bar shows X/Y counts (filed/expected months based on current month)
Frontend: Expired alert banner (red) shows document labels with expiration date
Frontend: Expiring alert banner (amber) shows document labels with days remaining
Frontend: Legend shows 'Filed', 'Missing', 'Upcoming' with color indicators
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test documents (expired permit, expiring permit, SSS, PhilHealth contributions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgriDocs Phase 3 fully tested. Compliance Dashboard with alerts and Monthly Filing Tracker working. Test documents were cleaned up after testing.

tests: GET /api/documents/compliance/summary returns year, monthly_coverage, expiring_soon, expired
monthly_coverage correctly tracks SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG contributions by month
expired array includes documents with valid_until < today
expiring_soon array includes documents expiring within 60 days with days_left
sub_category_label present in both expired and expiring_soon items

details: Red alert banner displays for expired documents
Shows count: 'Expired Documents (N)'
Shows document label (sub_category_label) and expiration date
data-testid='expired-alert' present
Amber alert banner displays for expiring documents
Shows count: 'Expiring Soon (N)'
Shows document label, days left, and expiration date
data-testid='expiring-alert' present
Displays 6 tracked filings: SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, BIR 1601-C, BIR 0619-E, BIR 2550M
Shows year heading 'Monthly Filing Tracker — 2026'
Shows 'Through March' for current month tracking
Dot indicators: green=filed, red=missing, gray=upcoming
Progress bars with X/Y counts (filed/expected)
Legend shows Filed, Missing, Upcoming colors
data-testid='monthly-tracker' and tracker row testids present
Dashboard visible on root view (no category selected, no search)
Dashboard hidden when inside a category folder
Dashboard hidden when search is active
branch_id='all' no longer passed to API calls
Frontend correctly excludes 'all' value from query parameters
Search by document name works
Search by tags works
Search via API uses $or with regex on name, description, tags, sub_category_label, employee_name
Category folders show correct document counts
Sub-category folders show correct file counts
Counts update after document upload
